# Peter Souza — AI Systems Builder & SDET

> Full-stack developer and AI specialist from Brazil. Building AI-powered products that help small businesses compete with enterprise tools.

## About

Peter Souza is a software engineer and SDET based in Linhares, Espírito Santo, Brazil. He specializes in AI-first application development, test automation, and building multi-agent systems. Currently working as an SDET at NDG Communications while building AutoVendas — a B2B AI platform for Brazilian car dealerships.

- **Location:** Linhares, ES, Brazil
- **Email:** peterleite.dev@gmail.com
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/PeterTechDev
- **LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/petertechdev/
- **Website:** https://petersouza.dev

## Core Skills

- **AI/ML:** Multi-agent systems, LLM orchestration, autonomous agents, prompt engineering, RAG pipelines
- **Languages:** TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Bash
- **Frameworks:** Next.js, React, Node.js, Playwright, Bun
- **Infrastructure:** Cloudflare Workers, Vercel, Supabase, Docker, Tailscale
- **Testing:** Playwright, TypeScript, Page Object Model, network interception, CI/CD pipelines
- **Tools:** OpenAI API, ElevenLabs, Twilio, Sentry, GitHub Actions

## Featured Projects

### AutoVendas
B2B AI platform for Brazilian used car dealerships. An AI workforce that handles WhatsApp lead qualification, inventory Q&A, and CRM automation. Multi-tenant SaaS with real paying customers.
- Stack: Next.js, Supabase, Twilio, OpenAI, Vercel
- URL: https://autovendas.vercel.app
- Case Study: https://petersouza.dev/case-study/autovendas/

### OpenClaw AI System
Personal AI assistant platform running 9 specialized agents (T-800, Robin, Ego, Marvin, etc.) on a local Dell G15. Handles nightly builds, research, code review, content pipelines, and memory management. 100% custom, zero off-the-shelf agent framework.
- Stack: Node.js, Claude API, custom orchestration layer

### Mind Palace
Internal ops dashboard for browsing brain docs, agent outputs, knowledge gaps, missions, and reports. Second brain made visible.
- Stack: Next.js 15, Tailwind CSS, Tailscale
- Internal: https://mindpalace.tail03ebe2.ts.net

### NDG PR Dashboard
Unified dashboard for monitoring open PRs across GitLab and Bitbucket for NDG Communications. Google OAuth restricted.
- URL: https://ndg-pr-dashboard.netlify.app

## Professional Background

- **SDET at NDG Communications** (June 2025–present) — Playwright + TypeScript automation, Page Object Model, CI pipelines
- **4 years experience** — 2 years dev + 2 years SDET
- **AI Systems Architect** — Designing and shipping production multi-agent systems
- **Contractor via Athyna** — USD $2,496/month base

## Content & Writing

Peter writes about AI engineering, agent architecture, and building software products in Brazil. Focus areas: practical LLM applications, multi-agent orchestration, SDET practices.
